Leland had always liked dogs. Even when he was a boy, he'd been attached to the farm dog--big old ugly thing it was. Before he'd... left... the department, he had debated joining the K9 unit. So maybe that's why, when the dog-man thing showed up, Leland grew attached. And now he was trying to train it to bring him the reagents and not just... gnaw on them.
